description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that runs a global before_script `git submodule update --init --recursive` for all jobs. Define an `install` job in the default test stage that executes `make DESTDIR=./tmp install && ls -lR tmp`. Add a `make_only` job (test stage) that runs `make`, `make opt`, `make release`, and `make debug` sequentially. Add a `statistics` job (test stage) that runs `time make opt-test`. Add a `test` job (test stage) that runs `make test`, `make debug-test`, `make opt-test`, and `make release-test`. No caches, artifacts, or special rules are configured.
